filer: Industrial Customer Organizations (IECA, AF&PA, PJM ICC, Coalition of MISO Transmission Customers)
summary: A coalition of large industrial customers presses hardest on cost causation: large loads must bear the network-upgrade costs they trigger so existing industrial and other customers are not saddled with data-center-driven costs.
key_points: Strict cost causation: data-center load pays for the upgrades it causes.
Protect existing transmission customers from cost-shifting.
Transparency into how large-load costs are identified and allocated.
